operations.reason: Drops the leading filler word 其实 so the video opens on 我真正用AI Agent. The word occupies v4 0-0.68 and is followed by a 0.56s pause, so the 1.02 cut lands in silence and leaves a 0.22s lead-in before the next word at v4 1.24.

The agent is waiting on page loads and reading; nothing is said that the narration needs. User picked the range in DaVinci on a 24fps timeline (07:00 to 08:27:07). Both cut points sit inside silence -- silencedetect puts the tail one in the middle of a 5.7s gap, 1.46s clear of the next line -- so no speech is clipped.

notes: Both edits are applied to v4 in a single ffmpeg pass, so v7 is one generation from v4, not two. v6 was the speed-up-only intermediate and has been removed.
Cuts are by time, not frame index: the master is VFR (avg 37.94fps, 27113 frames over 714.653s) and its r_frame_rate=120 is only the container timebase.

removed.reason: Opening removed; video now starts directly at the stronger setup without a residual sentence tail.
Repeated caveat about audience confusion; slows opening.
Extra examples after the two-ability conclusion.
Implementation tangent and second demo after the argument has closed.

subtitleNotes.issue: Line leads with 其实, which v7 cuts.
subtitleNotes.action: Text changed to 我真正用AI Agent也是从OpenClaw（龙虾）; start moved to the measured onset of the next word (v4 1.24 -> v7 0.22).

subtitleNotes.issue: Whisper merged a 6.7s silence into the head of this segment. silencedetect on the v4 audio shows 496.13-508.75 is silent apart from two sub-0.25s clicks; sustained speech starts at 509.49.
subtitleNotes.action: Start retimed to 509.49 before remapping, which also keeps the line out of the sped range.
